arts.ttl: Dundee United vs Celtic: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Celtic will need to put their controversial Scottish League Cup final victory to one side on Sunday when they visit Dundee United in the Scottish Premiership. While Dundee United have enjoyed a strong first half of the season, they are 19 points behind Celtic having played a game more, such is the gulf in quality between the teams.

arts.ttl: GARY KEOWN: Why the thought of Kieran Tierney and Callum McGregor being back together at Celtic is a matter of sadness - not celebration
arts.sum: THE very thought of it has Celtic supporters giddy with delight.

arts.ttl: I still need to improve: Arne Engels on losing his Celtic place and his future goals
arts.sum: Record Celtic signing Arne Engels has admitted he is determined to improve after lifting his first trophy as a professional in the Premier Sports Cup. .

arts.ttl: Arne Engels convinced Celtic wouldn't have lost if Rangers had been awarded penalty
arts.sum: Arne Engels feels the focus after Celtic’s dramatic Premier Sports Cup final win should have been on his record-equalling team mate James Forrest.

arts.ttl: Arne Engels declares Celtic would have STILL won Premier Sports Cup even if Rangers were awarded VAR penalty
arts.sum: The Belgian wasn't buying into the spot kick controversy

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted lineup vs Dundee United
arts.sum: Having won the Scottish League Cup final against Old Firm foes Rangers last weekend, Celtic can secure an eighth straight league victory at Tannadice. Celtic are looking to continue their remarkable recent form when they visit Dundee United in the Scottish Premiership.

arts.ttl: Coy Jota confession, Carney Chukwuemeka door opened and £11m man reveals exit 'plan' – Celtic transfer state of play
arts.sum: It's shaping up to be a busy January window for the Hoops

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson highlights Celtic star who is 'more than capable' of becoming starter under Rodgers
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers will likely take into account the bruising nature of last Sunday’s cup final, consulting all his options as the Bhoys prepare for a swift Scottish Premiership triple-header against Dundee United, Motherwell and St Johnstone. Speaking on the Go Radio Football Show, Ferguson thinks Celtic midfielder Luke McCowan is ‘more than capable’ of putting himself in contention to become a starter under Rodgers.

arts.ttl: Why Rangers NEVER targeted Aberdeen as Philippe Clement finally sees Celtic on the horizon
arts.sum: A 1-0 win over Dundee saw Gers move into the runners up spot after wiping out Dons' nine point lead

arts.ttl: Anthony Ralston outlines Celtic dressing room mindset after claiming first silverware of the campaign
arts.sum: Celtic will put their Premier Sports Cup win over Rangers behind them when they take on Dundee United tomorrow lunchtime in the Scottish Premiership. Despite the outcry from across the city, Celtic’s Premier Sports Cup victory over Rangers was as historic as they come, with the Bhoys surpassing their rivals’ all-time trophy haul at the national stadium.
